title: Escape Flood for Brainrots
description:
One of the scripters on this experience.

Systems

• Inventory System

title: Explode A Brainrot
description:
Lead developer on Explode A Brainrot — scripted every system from scratch.

Bombs
• Bomb throwing system with trajectory
• Bomb shop

Brainrot
• Brainrot spawning and client-side replication with mutations and traits
• Brainrot placer

Systems
• Custom inventory system
• Event system (Traits)
• Clean Tutorial System
• Offline rewards
• Plot upgrades
• Codes
• Timed Quests

UX
• UI animations

Other
• Leaderboards
• Admin panel

(Built on a custom module loader)

title: Grow a Bomb 🎃
description:
One of the scripters on this experience.

Plot Placement System
• Grid snapping and rotation support

Shops
• Bombs, Bases and Exclusive shop
• Global restock cycles and player-specific restock via Developer Products

Global Leaderboards
• Kills, Deaths, Robux Spent

Base Systems
• Base Around Plot mechanic with equippable bases
• Percentage cash per second boost tied to equipped base

Economy
• Cash Per Second (CPS) scaling with bombs placed
• Offline cash system for returning players
• Friend boost

Admin Tools
• CMD system for testing and live moderation

title: Steal & Feed A Animal [DEMO]
description: Solo developer on Steal & Feed A Animal — created and scripted the entire game, except for the dynamic weather system.
